# CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameIdle

**Case**

A new frame was not generated because the display did not change.

## Declaration

```swift
case frameIdle
```

## Constants

- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameComplete**: A new frame was generated.
- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.frameBlank**: A new frame was not generated because the display has gone blank.
- **CGDisplayStreamFrameStatus.stopped**: The display stream was stopped.

items.description: A new frame was not generated because the display has gone blank.
